## Checklist

- [ ] The project builds with no new warnings (⌘B)
- [ ] I used design-system tokens (no hard-coded colors/spacing)
- [ ] If this touches cleanup/deletion, it preserves the safety contract
      (Trash-routing, protected paths, dry-run, explicit confirmation)
- [ ] I updated docs / CHANGELOG where relevant
